sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jesuh si in hong sawp siang hi,
Nuamna thu kikum in om ni;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sihna gungal khatah, I tun ding hong nai ta!
I tun ding hong nai ta,
I tun ding hong nai ta,
I tun ding hong nai ta, Sinna gungal khatah.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Upna’n ka mu vantung ka en;
Ka za hi vantung mi’n la sa,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Bang aw ka za ding hiam tua-ah;
Ka lungsim hong vut hong tho sak,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Topa hong hilh bang ka zuihna,
Khawlngei lo-in ka phat ding hi,
Khitui khempeuh hong nul sak hi;
